Update van de kaart met de provinciegrenzen, cf. recente gemeentefusies (over provinciegrenzen heen).

```{r prep packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
```

```{r prep memory}
rm(list = ls())
rm(list = setdiff(ls(), c("ensure_multipolygons")))
```

```{r prep multisurface}
library(gdalUtilities)
ensure_multipolygons <- function(X) {
    tmp1 <- tempfile(fileext = ".gpkg")
    tmp2 <- tempfile(fileext = ".gpkg")
    st_write(X, tmp1)
    ogr2ogr(tmp1, tmp2, f = "GPKG", nlt = "MULTIPOLYGON")
    Y <- st_read(tmp2)
    st_sf(st_drop_geometry(X), geom = st_geometry(Y))
    }
```

```{r maps}
# Provincies
# note : multisurface
map <- read_sf("https://geo.api.vlaanderen.be/VRBG/wfs?service=WFS&version=2.0.0&request=GetFeature&typeName=VRBG:Refprv") %>%
  ensure_multipolygons()

# noot: identiek aan :

# map <- read_sf("https://geo.api.vlaanderen.be/VRBG2025/wfs?service=WFS&version=2.0.0&request=GetFeature&typeName=VRBG2025:Refprv") %>%
#   ensure_multipolygons()

# zie: https://www.vlaanderen.be/datavindplaats/catalogus/voorlopig-referentiebestand-gemeentegrenzen-toestand-01-01-2025-correctie-11-02-2025
```

```{r}
st_write(map, "./prius2/spatial/provincies2025.geojson", driver = "GeoJSON")
```
